subject: Sociology
title: Development and Aid
description: Learn Development and Aid in one minute.

hook.text: Trillions in aid have flowed to developing nations. Poverty persists. Something in the model isn't working.

buildup.text: Development theory evolved from modernization — follow the West — to dependency theory — the West holds you back.

discovery.text: Foreign aid can help, but it often comes with strings: policy conditions that serve donors more than recipients.

twist.text: Some argue aid creates dependency. Others say the real problem is that aid is too small and too conditional.

climax.text: Development isn't about charity. It's about restructuring global systems that produce inequality in the first place.

punchline.text: Aid can't fix what trade creates.

quiz.question: What does dependency theory argue?
options: Wealthy nations' dominance holds poorer nations back
